chunks.summary: Updated README: Skills badge 22→23, Commands badge 11→12, added `/mem_save`, updated hooks (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Stop), fixed repo structure comments.
Repo: claude-spellbook. 23 skills, 12 cmds, 5 agents for Claude Code. Automates audits, PRs, deps, onboarding. Cast spells wisely! 🧙 #dev #automation
Decisions: Integrate memory_map for persistent memory. Code changes: Revised options for MCP server. Topics: Memory integration, user experience. Problems solved: Reduces need for re-explanation.
Image input supported via direct upload or file path (e.g., C:\Users\Sidhartha\screenshot.png). Formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP.
Discussed input methods in cmd: drag & drop images or use file path. Clipboard paste not supported. No code changes or decisions made.
Fixed CI badge URL in README (sidharthamohanty → kid-sid). Enhanced header: added catchy sub-headline & revised description for clarity.
Decided to create a logo for 'spell-book'. Prompt includes ancient spellbook, glowing pages with code syntax, quill pen, dark bg, flat-icon style. No text.
Decided on logo prompt for "claude-spellbook": ancient grimoire, glowing pages, code visible, quill pen, dark bg, flat icon style. No text, square comp, GitHub avatar.
Decided to place logo in `claude-spellbook/assets/logo.png`. Updated README to include logo in `<div align="center">` with adjustable width.
Logo added to `assets/logo.png`, README updated to reference it.

Decisions: Add spell book to multiFileRAG. Code changes: Install agents, create `settings.local.json`. Topics: RAG pipeline, Azure, agents. Problems solved: Security, code review, dependency audit, test coverage.

Decisions: Add skills to multiFileRAG project. Code changes: Install `observability`, `security`, `performance` skills globally. Topics: Azure RAG, OpenAI embeddings, document processing. Problems solved: Metrics, secrets management, efficiency.

Created Azure skill in `skills/azure/skill.md`. Updated CLAUDE.md, README.md, and repo structure. Auth via `DefaultAzureCredential`, pydantic-settings for config, added Blob Storage & AI Search features.
Decided to keep `.github` in the repo. Discussed workflows for CI (format validation, markdown lint) and auto releases. Templates for issues and PRs noted as essential.
Decided to keep `.github` to maintain CI badge in README and skill format validation on PRs for spellbook functionality.
Spellbook can't be used in Codex as it relies on Claude Code's native features (skills, commands, agents, hooks). Codex uses AGENTS.md instead of CLAUDE.md.
Last chat: Image input methods, README fixes (CI badge, sub-headline), logo added, multiFileRAG agents/skills installed, Azure skill created.
Codex can't use Claude Code skills, hooks, commands, or agents. No code changes or decisions made. Discussed limitations of Codex vs. Claude Code features.
Created `ai-engineer` skill: added to CLAUDE.md & README.md. Updated skill file with model selection, RAG arch, agent orchestration, prompt engineering. Bumped README badge count to 25.

Decisions: Implement RAG pattern for complex docs (Excel, CSV, PDFs). Code changes: Added `skills/complex-doc-rag/skill.md`. Topics: edge cases, extraction tools, processing strategy. Problems solved: structured handling of diverse document types.
